serverError.description: Sorry, the server encountered an unexpected condition. Our technical team has already received an alert and is working on it.
serverError.copyHintHasId: Click to copy Request ID and share it with support.
serverError.copyHintNoId: No traceable request ID returned for this error.

forbidden.title: Restricted access
forbidden.description: Sorry, you do not have permission to access this page. Contact an administrator to grant menu permissions.
forbidden.securityNote: If you believe this is a bug, contact the system administrator to request the required permissions.

notFound.title: Data Void
notFound.description: The target node may have drifted or been recycled. The graph cannot resolve this legacy link.
